description: Validity panels for perturbation-vs-control analyses (paper4.5+ standard).
random_200_pool_genes_note: Drawn from adata.var_names at runtime with the locked seed; bundled list is empty by design — reproducibility comes from the seed + dataset gene order.

housekeeping.description: Eisenberg & Levanon 2013 minimal stable housekeeping set, intersected with HPA-detectable.

cell_cycle.description: Tirosh et al. 2016 G1/S + G2/M cell cycle markers, intersected with the perceptome Cell Cycle module activity targets.
